column4: Description
Handles JWT access token issuance validation and session lifecycle for secure API access across Customer Provider and Admin roles.
Integrates with Google OAuth 2.0 to verify id_token and create or link user profiles for customer and provider sign-in.
Enforces role and account-status checks on protected API routes using middleware before business logic execution.
Sends automated OTP emails via SMTP when users request password reset and validates OTP before allowing password change.
Creates PayOS payment links and QR codes for order deposits listing fees and processes payment status synchronization.
Receives and verifies PayOS webhook callbacks with HMAC signature validation and idempotently updates payment and order records.
Processes customer refund requests and admin-approved refunds through PayOS with order and payment status updates.
Uploads and serves user avatars provider verification documents marketplace listing images and delivery proof photos via Supabase Storage buckets.
Provides address search autocomplete and coordinate resolution using Google Maps API and OpenStreetMap Nominatim for booking flows.
Calculates route distance travel time and estimated pricing inputs between pickup and delivery coordinates.
Creates and stores in-app notifications for order updates marketplace events and admin alerts in the notifications table.
Allows administrators to create and publish system-wide or targeted announcements to platform users.
Persists and retrieves chat messages between customer and provider for active transport orders via REST API.
Persists and retrieves negotiation messages between Pass đồ buyers and sellers including price proposals and deal context.
Manages order state transitions including create accept start complete cancel and links payments quotes and provider assignment.
Handles provider price quotes for quotation-based bookings and customer quote acceptance with schedule alignment.

column3: Pass đồ Deal and Transport Linkage
column4: Manages listing interest deal confirmation transport-booked flag and order completion flow between C2C marketplace and transport booking.
Aggregates GMV revenue order statistics provider performance and commission metrics for the admin analytics dashboard.
Manages relational data through Supabase PostgreSQL including profiles orders payments marketplace listings and Row Level Security policies.
